preflight.mermaid_parse_check: pass — valid flowchart TB with config block, classDef definitions, diamond decision nodes, and edge labels; no syntax errors detected
preflight.node_count_check: pass — 7 nodes: entry(1) + check1/2/3/4(4) + pass/fail(2) = 7 total; within 3–8 range
preflight.label_length_check: pass — all ... labels ≤ 4 words: 'Algorithm candidate'(2), 'Finite?'(1), 'Definite?'(1), 'Input declared?'(2), 'Output declared?'(2), 'Well-defined algorithm'(2), 'Not well-defined'(3)
preflight.concept_fidelity_check: pass — all nodes map to corpus Core Concepts: 'Algorithm candidate'(§5.5/§6 checklist subject), 'Finite?'(§5.1 finiteness), 'Definite?'(§5.2 definiteness), 'Input declared?'(§5.3 input property), 'Output declared?'(§5.4 output property), 'Well-defined algorithm'(§5.5 explicit term), 'Not well-defined'(§5.5 explicit term). Edge labels 'infinite loop'(§5.1), 'ambiguity'(§5.2), 'nothing to work with'(§5.3), 'no visible effect'(§5.4) all trace to corpus §5.5 table column 'What breaks if this property is missing'
preflight.title_discipline_check: pass — 'Well-defined Algorithm — Four-Property Checklist' is set in the --- config title: field as a banner above the diagram, not a ghost node
preflight.single_path_discipline_check: pass — TB decision chain with deliberate yes/no branching is correct and intended for a gate checklist flow; each No branch routes to fail terminal, Yes continues the chain; this is not a spurious spur off a linear flow
preflight.label_plainness_check: pass — no bare unexplained acronyms; all labels use plain everyday English from the corpus; subtitles add context ('always stops', 'clear and precise', 'what data it needs', 'at least one result') accessible to zero-CS-background audience
preflight.color_tier_check: pass — entry uses start(#a5d8ff blue), four check/decision gates use auto(#d0bfff purple), Well-defined terminal uses done(#b2f2bb green), Not well-defined terminal uses hitl(#fff3bf amber with 3px border) signaling it needs revision/attention
preflight.scope_discipline_check: pass — no Big-O, efficiency, complexity, or 5th property nodes; diagram strictly limited to finiteness, definiteness, input, output, well-defined algorithm, not well-defined, infinite loop, termination, ambiguity concepts from this topic's headline

findings.where: full diagram — four-gate TB decision chain
findings.detail: 7 nodes in a clean TB checklist flow: entry → 4 sequential diamond checks (one per property, each with Yes/No branches) → two terminal verdicts. Every node label is plain English, ≤ 4 words, and directly corpus-grounded. Edge labels quote the exact failure modes from §5.5 table. Title banner 'Well-defined Algorithm — Four-Property Checklist' sits above the whole flow as the governing concept. Color palette follows project spec exactly: start(blue), auto(purple), done(green), hitl(amber). No scope creep. Intent fully fulfilled.
